notes: v213 — Paper trading overhaul: trades now stamped in Sydney time (fixes stops firing early), brokerage included in every P/L figure, 💰 record dividends, stale-price warnings before you trade, risk shown at buy time (% of account), optional realistic fills (buy at next day's open), optional slippage, limit orders expire after 30 days, richer stats (profit factor, expectancy), and 'since you sold' on closed trades.
